immediate_actions.note: Do this first; if others present, delegate

immediate_actions.step: Apply direct pressure with cloth or bandage — press firmly, do not lift
immediate_actions.note: Add more material on top if soaked; do not remove original

immediate_actions.step: Apply tourniquet if limb wound won't stop bleeding in 5 minutes
immediate_actions.note: 2-3 inches above wound, never over joint, write time on skin

immediate_actions.step: Lay person flat, elevate legs 12 inches if no spine injury
